scenario_description: The user wants to add product specifications to the manual but hasn't provided the specific values. The agent asks first.

command:
printf 'Product Manual

Product Name: Portable Bluetooth Speaker Pro

I. Product Introduction
This product features the latest Bluetooth 5.0 technology with clear, powerful sound, ideal for outdoor use.

II. Key Features
- Bluetooth 5.0 connectivity
- Waterproof rating: IP67
- Battery life: approximately 20 hours

III. Precautions
Do not place the product in high-temperature or humid environments.
' > /home/user/Desktop/product_desc.txt

DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true
DISPLAY=:1 xdotool key Escape 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.3; DISPLAY=:1 xdotool search --class 'soffice' windowfocus windowraise 2>/dev/null || DISPLAY=:1 wmctrl -xa 'soffice.Soffice' 2>/dev/null || true

phases.instruction: Help me add the product specs
Add "Weight: 250g, Dimensions: 15cm x 10cm x 3cm" at the end of the document, then save
